mapper.sql: room_no, room_name, location, capacity, status, created_at
reservation_no, room_no, user_no, reservation_date, start_time, end_time, status, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM room ORDER BY room_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room (room_name, location, capacity, status) VALUES (#{roomName}, #{location}, #{capacity}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'AVAILABLE'))
mapper.select: SELECT FROM room_reservation WHERE room_no = #{roomNo} ORDER BY reservation_date DESC, start_time DESC
SELECT FROM room_reservation WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY reservation_date DESC, start_time DESC
SELECT FROM room_reservation ORDER BY reservation_date DESC, start_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_reservation (room_no, user_no, reservation_date, start_time, end_time, status) VALUES (#{roomNo}, #{userNo}, #{reservationDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'RESERVED'))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_reservation WHERE reservation_date = CURRENT_DATE
